'''Llalik Designs''' was the personal business venture of [[Nashiak Llalik]] before he became a devotee of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. Llalik attempted to use this company for his pet project of [[Sunder 9]] [[Armor/Legends|armor]], but he eventually abandoned the project and the company after one year to work on the [[Zero-G assault stormtrooper]] armor for the Empire.
